free_text: H.G.B., S.A.K., K.S., F.H., G.G.C. AND EXPER-
IMENTAL SITE FOR (N,G) GAMMA SPEC. MEASUREMENTS
.THE PRIMARY GAMMA RAY DATA FOLLOWING RESONANCE-
AVERAGED NEUTRON CAPTURE (ARC) AND THE SECONDARY GAMMA
RAY DATA FOLLOWING FAST INELASTIC NEUTRON SCATTERING,
ALTHOUGH APPEARING IN THE MAIN REFERENCE, HAVE NOT
BEEN INCLUDED IN THIS EXFOR WORK.
.DY2O3 ENRICHED IN 162-DY, DIMENSIONS 40 X 4 X 0.06 MM.
MEASUREMENT OF GAMMAS FROM THERMAL CAPTURE.
GAMS1, RANGE 25-500 KEV, RESOLUTION 25 EV AT 150 KEV
GAMS2/3, RANGE 100-1800 KEV, RESOLUTION 90 EV AT
700 KEV IN THE 5TH ORDER OF REFLECTION.
STATISTICAL ERROR ONLY; FOR TOTAL ERRORS, A
SYSTEMATIC ERROR OF 10 PPM MUST BE ADDED.
STATE POPULATION OF 93%; FOR ABSOLUTE INTENSITIES A
SYSTEMATIC ERROR OF 20% MUST BE ADDED.
.THE PRIMARY AND SECONDARY TRANSITIONS RESULTED IN A
NEUTRON BINDING ENERGY OF 6271.04(9) KEV, FROM WHICH
THE LEVEL ENERGIES IN THE TABLE ARE OBTAINED BY COM-
BINING WITH THE PRIMARY GAMMA RAY ENERGIES.
.THE INTENSITIES ARE NORMALISED TO I=20.8 PER 1000
NEUTRON CAPTURES FOR THE 5450 KEV GAMMA RAY POPULATING
THIS TRANSITION ENERGY DOES NOT FIT WITH THE LEVEL
ENERGY DETERMINED BY SECONDARY GAMMA COMBINATIONS;
PROBABLY DOUBLET WITH THE TRANSITION TO THE 1058 KEV
